title: Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System
author: Satoshi Nakamoto
note: Primary design paper for Bitcoin's peer-to-peer cash model, proof of work, incentives, and issuance analogy to gold mining.

title: Bitcoin Core source code
author: Bitcoin Core contributors
note: Primary implementation reference for Bitcoin consensus behavior; pin to a release or commit before using for final line-level citations.

title: Money and the Mechanism of Exchange
author: William Stanley Jevons
note: Classic treatment of monetary functions, exchange frictions, metallic money, and historical monetary standards.

title: On the Origin of Money
author: Carl Menger
note: Historical monetary theory source on money as an emergent institution and the saleability of commodities.

title: Barter and Economic Disintegration
author: Caroline Humphrey
note: Anthropological critique useful for avoiding a simple barter-origin story of money.

title: Debt: The First 5,000 Years
author: David Graeber
note: Anthropological and historical critique of simple barter-first narratives; use carefully alongside monetary economics sources.
